omitted_declarations.policy_reference: FLAVAPP collects and processes personal data on a voluntary basis and it is not in the business of selling your personal data to third parties. Personal data may, however, occasionally be disclosed in accordance with applicable legislation and this Privacy Policy. Additionally, FLAVAPP may disclose personal data to its parent companies and its subsidiaries in accordance with this Privacy Policy. FLAVAPP may hire agents and contractors to collect and process personal data on FLAVAPP's behalf and in such cases such agents and contractors will be instructed to comply with our Privacy Policy and to use personal data only for the purposes for which the third party has been engaged by FLAVAPP. These agents and contractors may not use your personal data for their own marketing purposes. FLAVAPP may use third party service providers such as credit card processors, e-mail service providers, shipping agents, data analyzers and business intelligence providers. FLAVAPP has the right to share your personal data as necessary for the aforementioned third parties to provide their services for FLAVAPP. FLAVAPP is not liable for the acts and omissions of these third parties, except as provided by mandatory law. FLAVAPP may disclose your personal data to third parties as required by law enforcement or other government officials in connection with an investigation of fraud, intellectual property infringements, or other activity that is illegal or may expose you or FLAVAPP to legal liability. FLAVAPP may also disclose your personal data to third parties when FLAVAPP has a reason to believe that a disclosure is necessary to address potential or actual injury or interference with FLAVAPP's rights, property, operations, users or others who may be harmed or may suffer loss or damage, or FLAVAPP believes that such disclosure is necessary to protect FLAVAPP 's rights, combat fraud and/or comply with a judicial proceeding, court order, or legal process served on FLAVAPP. To the extent permitted by applicable law, FLAVAPP will make reasonable efforts to notify you of such disclosure through FLAVAPP's website or in another reasonable manner.
